tasks.name: gabinet_wysiwyg_template_editor
tasks.note: Superseded by platform-level document template system. Existing TipTap editor will be migrated in task DT-02. Keep blocked until DT-02 starts.

tasks.name: layout_auto_hide_column2
tasks.note: Carried from S0056. Unrelated to document system. Status unclear — needs review.

tasks.name: move_patient_cards_to_middle_sidebar
tasks.note: Carried from S0056. Unrelated to document system. Status unclear — needs review.

tasks.name: data_source_registry_and_types
tasks.description: DataSourceDefinition type, central registry (getAllDataSources, getDataSource, resolveSource), bazowe source'y (system, current_user, org), source'y Gabinet (patient, employee, appointment), source'y CRM (contact, company, lead, deal). Query listAvailableSources(module) for UI discovery.

tasks.name: schema_tables
tasks.description: Add documentTemplates, documentTemplateFields, documentInstances tables to convex/schema.ts with all indexes.

tasks.name: backend_templates_crud
tasks.description: convex/documentTemplates.ts — create, update, archive, publish (draft→active), duplicate. Queries: list (filters), getById, listActive (user access control check).

tasks.name: backend_template_fields_crud
tasks.description: convex/documentTemplateFields.ts — create, update, remove, reorder. Query: listByTemplate.

tasks.name: backend_instances_crud_and_rendering
tasks.description: convex/documentInstances.ts — create (resolve sources + render HTML), update draft, workflow transitions (status machine), sign (add signature to slot), archive. Queries: list (filters), getById, listByResolvedSource. renderTemplate function: content + bindings + values → HTML snapshot.

tasks.name: ui_template_editor
tasks.description: TipTap editor with {{field:key}} badge nodes (inline, non-editable, draggable, double-click to edit). {{ autocomplete dropdown. Toolbar 'Insert field' button. Migrate and generalize from gabinet/template-editor.tsx.

tasks.name: ui_template_field_panel_and_config
tasks.description: Side panel: field list with drag-and-drop sort, add/edit/delete buttons, binding info display. 'Available data sources' tree section. source-field-picker.tsx: cascading selects source→field. template-field-config.tsx: modal with label, key, type, binding toggle (manual vs source), validation, options (for select), width.

tasks.name: ui_template_admin_routes
tasks.description: Settings → Document Templates routes. List page (table with filters, actions: edit/duplicate/archive). New template page (full-screen editor + field panel + settings). Edit template page ($id). Header: name, category, module select, requiredSources, description, preview button, save draft / publish.

tasks.name: ui_template_picker
tasks.description: Dialog: list of available templates grouped by category, filtered by user access + module + requiredSources compatibility. Search, source requirement badges, greyed-out incompatible templates with tooltip. Step 1a: source-instance-picker for missing required sources (entity search).

tasks.name: ui_document_from_template
tasks.description: Split view: field form (40%) + live HTML preview (60%). Fields sorted/grouped, width half/full, bound fields pre-filled with source data + 'auto-filled' indicator + 'restore from source' on override. Live preview debounce 300ms, unfilled = orange placeholder. Mobile: tabs. Title field with default. Actions: save draft, approve, cancel (dirty check).

tasks.name: ui_document_viewer
tasks.description: Read-only rendered HTML. Header: title, status badge, metadata, resolved source links. Signature section: slots with status, sign button (opens pad), auto-signed transition. Actions per status (edit/approve/reject/sign/pdf/archive/restore). Migrate and generalize from gabinet/document-viewer.tsx.

tasks.name: ui_document_routes
tasks.description: Platform document routes. /dashboard/documents — instance list (table: title, template, category, status, source badges, author, date; filters). /dashboard/documents/$instanceId — instance view (viewer + actions).

tasks.name: integration_module_gabinet
tasks.description: DocumentFromTemplateDialog wrapper (sources map + module prop). Patient card: Documents tab with filtered instance list + 'New from template' button (sources: {patient: patientId}). Appointment view: button + list (sources: {patient, appointment}).

tasks.name: integration_module_crm
tasks.description: Contact card: Documents tab + button (sources: {contact}). Company card: Documents tab + button (sources: {company}). Deal card: Documents tab + button (sources: {deal, contact, company}).

tasks.name: workflow_signatures_pdf
tasks.description: Workflow transition validation (required fields check before approve). Signature pad integration in viewer. PDF export: client-side html2canvas + jsPDF, signatures appended, save to Convex storage, re-download. Notifications: review request, signature request.

tasks.name: migration_gabinet_documents
tasks.description: Migration script: gabinetDocumentTemplates → documentTemplates + documentTemplateFields (auto-create fields with bindings from old {{patient.X}} placeholders). gabinetDocuments → documentInstances. Update Gabinet routes to use new system. Deprecate old tables.

tasks.name: rbac_permissions
tasks.description: Add document_templates (view/create/edit/delete) and document_instances (view/create/edit/approve/sign/delete) to orgPermissions. Enforce in all backend mutations and queries. Per-template accessControl check in listActive.

reason: S0057: Full task breakdown for platform-level document template system with Data Source Registry. 6 etaps, 15 tasks (DT-01 through DT-17), dependency chain ensures correct build order.
thinking_process: Decomposed docs/document-templates-system.md plan into implementable tasks. Each task maps to a concrete set of files. Dependencies reflect build order: schema first, then backend CRUD, then UI components, then routes, then module integrations, then workflow/PDF, then migration. See verbose file for etap grouping and rationale.

how_to_test.name: M1: Admin creates template with 3+ field types (text, date, select), publishes, visible to users
M2: User selects template from entity context, bound fields auto-filled, override works, live preview updates
M3: Full workflow: draft → pending_review → approved → pending_signature → signed
M4: Signature pad, save, auto-signed when all slots done, signed = immutable
M5: PDF export with content + signatures, save to storage, re-download
M6: Edit active template creates new version, old instances keep snapshot
M7: Access control: no-access user doesn't see template, no-approve user doesn't see approve button
M8: Same template used from CRM contact context and Gabinet patient context — core unchanged
M9: New module = 1 data source file, zero core changes, new sources appear in editor
M10: Template with multiple sources (patient + appointment + org) resolves all correctly
M15: Migrated Gabinet documents readable with signatures preserved
